logging-spring-tests/src/main/java/com/g.general_idea: Explicitly specify the request parameter name in @RequestParam annotations to avoid ambiguity or strict binding errors.
Explicitly declare the consumed media type for a POST endpoint to ensure correct content negotiation.
Add a new endpoint to handle multipart file uploads.

logging-spring-tests/src/test/java/com/g.general_idea: Refactor imports to use static wildcard import for JUnit assertions.
Add imports for Logback and SLF4J to enable test-time logging configuration.
Add imports for Spring HTTP and I/O utilities to support new multipart and form-data tests.
Add import for custom MemoryAppender and SpringLoggingFilter to verify logging output.
Add MemoryAppender field and setup method to configure in-memory logging for tests.
Add assertions to verify logging output size in findById test.
Add assertions to verify logging output size and content in getWithReqParam test.
Add assertions to verify logging output size and content in post test.
Refactor postByIdReqParam test to use HttpEntity with form-urlencoded content instead of null body.
Add new test method postMultipart to verify multipart file upload logging.
Add helper method getTestFile to create a temporary file for multipart tests.

logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.general_idea: Add a new configuration property 'ignorePayload' to control whether request/response payloads are logged.
Remove unused import of Apache Commons IO utility class.
Remove unused import of Spring RequestMappingInfo.
Remove unused static import for Logstash structured arguments.
Add import for the new LoggingPrinter utility class.
Replace manual boolean flag with a dedicated LoggingPrinter instance to encapsulate logging logic.
Update constructor to initialize LoggingPrinter with new configuration options.
Delegate request logging to the new LoggingPrinter utility.
Delegate response logging to the new LoggingPrinter utility.
Remove unused variable assignment for handler methods map.
Remove explicit MDC clearing to prevent race conditions or loss of context in concurrent environments.
Cache the request parameter map in the constructor to ensure it remains accessible after the input stream is consumed.
logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.why_exists: Without caching, calling getParameterMap() after the input stream is read (or if the wrapper is used in a context where parameters need to be re-accessed) would fail or return stale data because the underlying request's stream is consumed by the body capture logic.

logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.general_idea: Override getParameterMap() to return the cached parameter map instance.
logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.why_exists: Ensures that the cached parameters are returned instead of delegating to the underlying request, which might be in an inconsistent state regarding parameter parsing after stream consumption.

logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.general_idea: Prioritize query string for body content if present, falling back to input stream.
logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.why_exists: Ensures that GET requests with query parameters have their body populated with the query string, providing a consistent body representation for logging regardless of HTTP method.

reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.general_idea: Add query parameters to the request log output for better debugging visibility.
reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.before:
LOGGER.info("Request: id={}, method={}, uri={}, headers={}, audit={}",requestId ,exchange.getRequest().getMethod(),
					exchange.getRequest().getURI().getPath(), exchange.getRequest().getHeaders(), value("audit", true));
reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.after:
LOGGER.info("Request: id={}, method={}, uri={}, payload={}, headers={}, audit={}", requestId,
                            exchange.getRequest().getMethod(),
                            exchange.getRequest().getURI().getPath(),
                            exchange.getRequest().getQueryParams() != null ? exchange.getRequest().getQueryParams().toSingleValueMap() : "",
                            exchange.getRequest().getHeaders(),
                            value("audit", true));

reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.general_idea: Remove redundant MDC.clear() call at the start of the method.
Fix bug where correlation ID logic incorrectly used the request ID header name for both reading and writing.
